title: Hand Decorated Easter Bunny LED Candle – Decoupage Rabbit Family

metrics.description: Easter themed candle with hand painted details that will bring festive mood to your home! The candle is decorated by hand using thermal decoupage technique. Can be made as traditional candle or as a LED one. As the products are hand decorated, there may be minor differences in the details from the example shown. All of the candles can be made both as LED candles and as traditional ones depending on your preferences. Captions, names and wishes can also be added. Please contact me if the type of candle that you want to order is not available in the option bar. Thank you!

dynamicFeatures.customization: Personalization available, including captions, names, and wishes.
dynamicFeatures.ledCandleDetails: Simulates real flame, made from paraffin wax, uses 3 AAA batteries (not included). Timer and remote control can be added via separate listings.

title: Candle file EASTER BUNNY floral greeting, spring, flowers, bunnies, Easter, waterslide film, candle sticker, candle tattoo, PDF, JPG, watercolor

metrics.description:
CANDLE FILE FLOWER GREETING FROM THE EASTER BUNNY FOR A4 PRINT ON WATER SLIDE FILM
The Easter candle file "FLOWER GREETINGS FROM THE EASTER BUNNY" contains various coordinated motifs in watercolor, graphics and lettering, which can all be combined well with each other and leave plenty of room for your own creativity. Depending on the combination, the graphic lettering, the elegant watercolor flowers and the cute Easter bunnies can be used to create simple, elegant or cute, playful candle motifs.
PLEASE NOTE: This is NOT a finished product, but a digital print template with multiple uses on one A4 page.
After downloading, the PDF (or JPG) only needs to be printed 1:1 on waterslide film. Printing and processing is carried out according to the instructions of the manufacturer of the respective film.
The finished printed motifs are cut out with as little border as possible, briefly soaked in water and applied to the candles according to personal taste.
The candle file is available for download as a DIN A4 page in PDF format and as a high-resolution JPG.

dynamicFeatures.usageLicense: Personal license for private use (commercial license available separately)
dynamicFeatures.applicationMethod: Print on waterslide film, cut out, soak in water, apply to candles

title: Google Pixel 8 Pro – Android Smartphone ohne SIM-Lock mit Teleobjektiv, langer Akkulaufzeit und leistungsstarkem Google Tensor G3 – Obsidian, 128 GB

metrics.description: The Google Pixel 8 Pro is an Android smartphone featuring Google AI for advanced photo and video editing. It boasts an impressive 6.7-inch Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2 display and is powered by the Google Tensor G3 chip. With over 24 hours of battery life (up to 72 hours in Extreme Power Saving Mode), it includes a powerful triple camera system with a telephoto lens, improved ultrawide, and main camera. Enhanced with the Titan M2 security chip, it receives 7 years of security updates.

dynamicFeatures.batteryLife: Over 24 hours (up to 72 hours with Extreme Power Saving Mode)
dynamicFeatures.securityFeatures: Titan M2 security chip, 7 years of security updates

title: Google Pixel 8a Android Smartphone with AI, powerful camera and long-lasting battery - Obsidian

metrics.description: Google AI: The Pixel 8a is fast and smart, with Google AI that helps you do more, even faster. Amazing photos and videos: The Pixel 8a's powerful camera makes every photo and video look amazing. Long-lasting battery: The adaptive battery lasts over 24 hours. With Extreme Battery Saver, it can last up to 72 hours. Secure and durable: With IP67 protection, the Pixel 8a can withstand splashes, dust and scratches. And with VPN by Google One, your online activities are protected. Seamless switching: Transfer your data from your old phone to your new Pixel in just a few steps.

title: Google Pixel 10 Pro - Unlocked Android Smartphone - Gemini AI Assistant, Triple Rear Camera System, Fast-Charging 24+ Hour Battery, and 6.3" Super Actua Display - Obsidian - 256 GB (2025 Model)

metrics.description: Google Pixel 10 Pro is the ultimate Pixel experience, featuring advanced AI - Gemini, unbelievable camera quality, impeccable design in two sizes, and the next-gen Google Tensor G5 chip.
features: Google Pixel 10 Pro is the ultimate Pixel experience, featuring advanced AI - Gemini, unbelievable camera quality, impeccable design in two sizes, and the next-gen Google Tensor G5 chip.
Unlocked Android phone gives you the flexibility to change carriers and choose your own data plan; it works with Google Fi, Verizon, T-Mobile, AT&T, and other major carriers.

Pixel’s pro camera system makes everything look amazing, even in low light; capture more of the scene with advanced Google AI models, and bring out incredible details with 100x Pro Res Zoom, stunning 50 MP images, and super steady videos in 8K.

Pixel 10 Pro is built with durable aluminum and Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2 for scratch and drop resistance; the 6.3-inch Super Actua display with 3,300-nit peak brightness is easy on the eyes, even in direct sunlight.

Instead of typing, use Gemini Live to have a natural, free-flowing conversation; point your camera at what you’re curious about – like a sea creature at the aquarium – or chat with Gemini to brainstorm ideas or get things done across apps.

dynamicFeatures.Included Components: Cell Phone, USB Cable, Warranty Booklet
